articles.title: NFL executives reportedly ‘expect’ Patriots to acquire A.J. Brown
articles.description:
Experts widely view June 1 as the date to mark on one’s calendar regarding the A.J. Brown saga.

The post NFL executives reportedly ‘expect’ Patriots to acquire A.J. Brown appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NFL executives predict the Patriots will acquire A.J. Brown by June 1.
A.J. Brown is a key wide receiver currently with the Philadelphia Eagles.
This acquisition could significantly enhance the Patriots' offensive capabilities for the upcoming season.
